title: Roots That Define Us
subtitle: Over five decades growing alongside the fresh produce industry
content: Fruit Service was born from a deep agricultural heritage and a strong commitment to quality. With more than 50 years of experience in the production and distribution of fresh fruit, the founding family launched their own project built on trust, innovation, and service.
From modest beginnings, the company has grown steadily, expanding its operational capacity and strengthening its presence in both national and international markets.

Continuous investment in technology, process modernization, and infrastructure improvements has positioned Fruit Service as a respected leader in the sector, managing high daily volumes while maintaining the utmost care for every product.

Today, we remain a family-owned company that combines experience with modern management and a clear commitment to sustainability, driven by our enduring passion for delivering the very best of the land to every customer.
